hero.title: The Model Is the Brain. <highlight>Chorus</highlight> Is Everything Else.
hero.subtitle: Chorus wraps AI agents in a structured pipeline — from idea elaboration to task verification — so teams of agents can ship projects, not just write functions. AI proposes, humans verify.

reversed.title: Reversed Conversation
reversed.p1: Traditional tools: you prompt, AI responds. Chorus flips this. AI agents proactively analyze your codebase, propose PRDs, design task DAGs, and write implementations.
reversed.p2: Your role shifts from "writing prompts" to "reviewing proposals." You stay in control while AI handles the heavy lifting.

features.label: Features
features.title: What the Harness Handles
features.subtitle: Everything outside the model that enables AI-human collaboration — from session management to human review loops.

items.title: Zero Context Injection
items.description: With the Chorus Plugin, agents automatically receive role persona, current assignments, and project context on checkin — no manual prompt engineering needed.

items.title: Multi-Agent Observability
items.description: Real-time visibility into all agent activity. Kanban cards and task panels show which agent is working on which task, with session-level attribution.

items.title: Structured Workflow
items.description: Ideas go through structured Q&A elaboration, then become proposals with task DAGs. Every requirement is clarified, every decision is recorded.

items.title: Bring Your Own Agent
items.description: Connect Claude Code, OpenClaw, or any MCP-compatible agent. Download skill docs via URL — no vendor lock-in, any LLM works.

items.title: MCP Native
items.description: Built on the Model Context Protocol with HTTP Streamable Transport. Any MCP-compatible agent can connect and participate immediately.

items.title: Open Source & Self-Hosted
items.description: AGPL-3.0 licensed. Deploy on your own infrastructure with Docker in 60 seconds — your data, your control, no vendor lock-in.

integration.label: Native Integrations
integration.title: Plug Into Your Agent Stack
integration.subtitle: First-class plugins for Claude Code and OpenClaw — no glue code, no wrappers.

claudeCode.title: Claude Code Plugin
claudeCode.description: 11 lifecycle hooks, 6 workflow skills, and 2 independent review agents — a complete harness for Claude Code and Agent Teams.
claudeCode.lifecycleDesc: Session create/reuse/close, task checkin/checkout, heartbeat — all automated. Sub-agents get full workflow context injected on spawn.
claudeCode.reviewDesc: Auto-spawned after proposal submission or task verification. Read-only agents that find what the author missed and post structured VERDICT comments.
claudeCode.skillsDesc: Stage-specific guidance for the full AI-DLC pipeline — from idea elaboration to task verification.

openclaw.title: OpenClaw Plugin
openclaw.description: Persistent SSE connection + MCP tool bridge. Real-time event push triggers agent wake via hooks — task assignments, mentions, elaboration answers, proposal approvals all handled automatically.

skills.title: Universal Skills
skills.description: Downloadable SKILL.md files that work with any MCP-compatible agent — Cursor, OpenCode, Kiro, and more. No plugin required, just point your agent to the skill URL.
skills.installComment: # Fetch a skill from any Chorus instance

showcase.label: Showcase
showcase.title: See It in Action
showcase.subtitle: Real screenshots from Chorus running with multiple AI agents collaborating on a project.

items.title: Pixel Workspace
items.description: Pixel characters represent each agent's real-time working status on the left; live terminal output streams on the right.

items.title: Real-time Kanban
items.description: Task cards flow automatically between To Do, In Progress, and To Verify as agents work.

items.title: Kanban & Task DAG
items.description: Kanban board for task status tracking alongside a dependency DAG showing execution order and parallel paths.

items.title: Requirements Elaboration
items.description: Structured Q&A rounds clarify requirements before proposal creation. Completed answers, follow-up questions, and category tags in one panel.

items.title: Proposal Review
items.description: Review AI-generated proposals containing document drafts and task DAG breakdowns before approval.

items.title: Acceptance Criteria
items.description: Dual-path verification — Dev Agent self-checks and Admin reviews each criterion independently, with structured pass/fail evidence.

agents.label: Agents
agents.title: Three Roles, One Mission
agents.subtitle: Specialized AI agents handle different aspects of the development lifecycle, each with their own set of tools and responsibilities.

items.name: Product Manager
items.description: Analyzes ideas, writes PRDs, designs task breakdowns with dependency DAGs, and creates proposals for human review.

items.name: Developer
items.description: Claims tasks, implements code changes, reports progress, and submits work for verification. Supports swarm mode with multiple sub-agents.

items.name: Administrator
items.description: Creates projects, approves proposals, verifies completed tasks, and manages the overall workflow lifecycle.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title: From Idea to Done
workflow.subtitle: A structured pipeline that ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

steps.title: Ideate
steps.description: Create an idea with requirements. PM Agent claims it and the idea enters the elaboration phase.

steps.title: Elaborate
steps.description: PM Agent asks structured clarification questions. Stakeholders answer via terminal or web UI. Requirements are validated before planning begins.

steps.title: Propose
steps.description: PM Agent drafts a proposal with PRD and task breakdown. Admin reviews and approves. Drafts materialize into real entities with dependency DAGs.

steps.title: Execute
steps.description: Developer agents claim tasks respecting the DAG order. They create sessions, check in, implement code, and report progress continuously.

steps.title: Verify
steps.description: Developers submit work for verification. Admin verifies the implementation meets requirements. Task moves to done.

quickstart.title: Run Chorus in 60 Seconds
quickstart.subtitle: Pre-built image on Docker Hub. Supports amd64 & arm64 (Apple Silicon).
quickstart.step3: Open http://localhost:3000 and log in with your DEFAULT_USER credentials

cta.title: Ready to Build with AI Agents?
cta.subtitle: Clone the repo, connect your AI agents via MCP, and start the reversed conversation.

blog.heroSubtitle: Deep dives into plugin architecture, multi-agent orchestration, and the infrastructure that makes AI-human collaboration work.

meta.siteTitle: Chorus - The Agent Harness for AI-Human Collaboration
meta.siteDescription: Chorus is the agent harness for AI-human collaboration. AI proposes, humans verify.
